system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

You quickly strike a meridian point on the top of your opponent’s head, disrupting the flow of Qi to the liver. On a Success the person feels irritable, even depressed and finds their eyes lose focus. This imposes a -1d10 penalty to Detect for one hour per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic: The target suffers the above effects plus is overcome with stiffness and pain of the joints, taking a -1d10 penalty per Rank of Dianxue to Athletics and Detect for one hour. This can also be used to reverse the effects of the Technique.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: The target suffers the above effects plus is overcome with stiffness and pain of the joints, taking a -1d10 penalty per Rank of Dianxue to Athletics and Detect for one hour. This can also be used to reverse the effects of the Technique.
